summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Marketwide Value ETF (DFUV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US stocks, selected for having value characteristics. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation. DFUV was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Dimensional Lists US Marketwide Value ETF After Completing Mutual Fund-to-ETF Conversion
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors, a global leader in systematic investing, further expanded its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) offering with today's listing of the firm's US Mar...

news.t: Dimensional Lists US Marketwide Value ETF After Completing Mutual Fund-to-ETF Conversion

holdings.infoBox: DFUV is an equity ETF with a total of 1341 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.96%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.34%, ExxonMobil Holdings at 2.98%, Johnson & Johnson at 2.96%, and Amazon.com at 2.65%.
